data.raceName: SPORTSBET UP & COMING STARS SERIES FINAL
data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Up and Coming Stars Final is worth 300K over 1400m, and the very promising 13. DIRTY LOOK caught the eye with a strong finish for second at Sandown-Lakeside 17 days ago over this trip. She is likely to settle back again, but the tempo in this race should be very genuine. If the gaps come at the right time, then she can have the last say. 4. HOT SAND has thrived since resuming from a spell, and he put it all together when winning a handy maiden at Ballarat just over 3 weeks ago by a short-head. He will only improve again with more racing, and another win would be no surprise. 3. SANTANA rewarded his faithful supporters when capping off some strong form with a well-deserved win as the favourite last time out over 1200m. He cops a wide gate, but the extra 200m will suit him, so stick with him. 1. TEN WARRIORS was an overdue but impressive winner last time out on the Heath course here, and he has won a jump-out since then. Now that the penny has dropped, he can go on with it.","runners":[13,4,3,1],"exclusive":true}
